task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient (Jayson Fadel) is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Jayson Fadel', 'DOB: 1992-06-30', or 'PID: 3' in the patient dashboard header or active patient context.

task_completion.description: Verify an encounter is created or opened for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active encounter screen, 'Current Encounter', or a 'New Encounter' form being filled out for Jayson Fadel.

task_completion.description: Verify a SOAP note form is opened within the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'SOAP' note form interface, typically showing fields for Subjective, Objective, Assessment, and Plan.

task_completion.description: Verify the Assessment section is documented with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Assessment text box containing the required text about essential hypertension, or at minimum the keywords 'hypertension', 'controlled', and 'blood pressure'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Plan section is documented with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Plan text box containing the required text starting with 'Continue amLODIPine/HCTZ/Olmesartan combination...' and mentioning the DASH diet and aerobic exercise.

task_completion.description: Verify the SOAP note is saved to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' button being clicked, a success confirmation message, or the completed SOAP note appearing in the encounter summary/clinical notes list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenEMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the OpenEMR interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for OpenEMR menus, patient dashboards, and encounter forms, not a generic text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open running MySQL or SQLite commands to insert the SOAP note directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel (PID: 3, DOB: 1992-06-30). Condition SNOMED: 59621000. Required Assessment keywords: 'hypertension', 'controlled', 'blood pressure'.
